name: Asymmetric Precision v2 Launch Candidate
principle: A launch is not a finish line. A launch is a declared standard.
launchQuestions: Does the site communicate AP's purpose within seconds?
Does every major page explain what it is, why it matters, how to apply it, and where to go next?
Do the systems connect instead of merely coexist?
Does the experience increase understanding instead of chasing engagement?
Is the site ready to become the public standard for AP v2?
